ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. ICC/West Sweden Chamber of Commerce stamp.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF with two pages: page 1 is the invoice, page 2 is a packing list. Both fully legible. Invoice is branded 'Wood Pie / Quality wood from Europe'.

lc_check.motivation: No LC (Letter of Credit) reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-454855, which does not contain any LC banking term. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar exists in the certificate.

occurrences.context: The invoice header shows 'Wood Pie' with a logo and tagline 'Quality wood from Europe'. This is the commercial/brand name corresponding to WOODPIE AB.

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: The consignor name 'WOODPIE AB' can be identified in the invoice via the branding 'Wood Pie' in the invoice header. The invoice is issued by Wood Pie (commercial brand of WOODPIE AB). No other seller/issuer address block with explicit country is present on the invoice.

parning_validation.motivation: Criterion 1 (invoice number): The certificate does not reference a specific invoice number; the certificate remark field shows 'P149' which does not match invoice number 1095. However, Criterion 2 (consignor): WOODPIE AB can be identified in the invoice via the 'Wood Pie' branding. Criterion 3 (consignee): SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED in the certificate can be identified as SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED in the invoice (one character difference, to be assessed in checkpoint 4.2). At least one criterion is met. Parning validation PASSED.

candidates.raw_text: SURVEY NO. 362/1, MITHI ROHAR NATIONAL HIGHWAY GANDHIDHAMGUJARAT-370201, GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG, IEC CODE: 0511009909
candidates.normalized_text: Survey No. 362/1, Mithi Rohar, National Highway, Gandhidham Gujarat-370201

candidates.raw_text:
Total no of containers: 1
Total no of packages: 8
SURVEY NO. 362/1, MITHI ROHAR, NATIONAL HIGHWAY,GANDHIDHAMGUJARAT-370201, INDIA GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG,
candidates.normalized_text: Survey No. 362/1, Mithi Rohar, National Highway, Gandhidham Gujarat-370201, India

candidates.raw_text: Port of loading: Any port in Sweden

checkpoints.invoice_value: Wood Pie (header/branding), Country of Origin: Sweden, Port of loading: Any port in Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name WOODPIE AB in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: The invoice header shows 'Wood Pie' with branding. This is a commercial name variant of 'WOODPIE AB'. The names are not identical but share the same distinctive core 'WOOD PIE' / 'WOODPIE'. Proceeding to sequential testing 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.

comparison_steps.description: Check if WOODPIE AB can be identified as same legal party as Wood Pie
comparison_steps.result: The certificate states 'WOODPIE AB'. The invoice header states 'Wood Pie'. These differ: 'WOODPIE' (one word) vs 'Wood Pie' (two words). However, the concatenation of 'Wood' and 'Pie' yields 'WoodPie' which matches 'WOODPIE' after case normalization. The difference is only spacing (one word vs two words). Proceeding to check additional rules.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.4 - Commercial name vs registered company name
comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Wood Pie' is the commercial/brand name for registered entity 'WOODPIE AB'
comparison_steps.result: The invoice lacks explicit seller address block with street/postal code. Cannot verify exact address match. Proceeding to 4.1.3.9.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.9 - Consignor as invoice issuer without explicit seller address
comparison_steps.description: Check if WOODPIE can be identified as invoice issuer with land-corroborating elements
comparison_steps.result: Condition 1: The core name 'WOODPIE' / 'Wood Pie' can be identified in the invoice header/branding after normalization (space removal: WoodPie = WOODPIE). Condition 2: The invoice lacks a dedicated seller/issuer address block with explicit country. Condition 3: The invoice contains 'Country of Origin: Sweden' and 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden' — both consistent with consignor country Sweden. Condition 4: No information in the invoice contradicts that the issuer is from Sweden. All conditions for 4.1.3.9 are met → MANUAL_REVIEW per this rule.

comparison_steps.description: Assess whether WOODPIE vs Wood Pie is a substantive name difference or merely a formatting/spacing variation
comparison_steps.result: After normalization of spaces, 'WOODPIE' and 'WoodPie' are identical. The AB is a Swedish legal form suffix (handled by 4.1.3.6). The only difference is the space between 'Wood' and 'Pie' — this is a formatting/spacing variation, not a different word. The invoice is branded and issued by this entity. Combined with the 'Quality wood from Europe' tagline and the fact that the invoice is the only commercial document in the pair, this is the same entity. Under section 4 normalization (extra mellanslag), spacing differences are permitted. Combined with 4.1.3.6 (AB is legal form), the core name after normalization is identical.

comparison_steps.description: Verify Sweden as consignor country
comparison_steps.result: The invoice states 'Country of Origin: Sweden' and 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden'. While Country of Origin refers to goods origin, Port of loading confirms Swedish connection. The invoice is branded Wood Pie — same entity as WOODPIE AB Sweden. Country is corroborated.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - search for consignor in all invoice files

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: WOODPIE AB and Wood Pie are different legal entities
rejected_hypotheses.reason: After normalization of spaces, the core name is identical: WOODPIE = WoodPie. The only differences are spacing (allowed normalization) and legal form suffix AB (allowed per 4.1.3.6). The invoice is issued by the same entity.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'WOODPIE AB' in Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'Wood Pie' (header branding). After normalization: removing space → 'WoodPie' = 'WOODPIE' (case normalization). 'AB' is Swedish legal form (4.1.3.6). Country verified via 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden' and 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare WOODPIE AB kan identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud som 'Wood Pie' efter normalisering av mellanslag (WOODPIE = WoodPie) och borttagning av bolagsformssuffix AB. Landet Sverige styrks via 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden' samt 'Country of Origin: Sweden'.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, SURVEY NO. 362/1, MITHI ROHAR NATIONAL HIGHWAY GANDHIDHAMGUJARAT-370201, GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG, IEC CODE: 0511009909, India
checkpoints.invoice_value: SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, SURVEY NO. 362/1, MITHI ROHAR, NATIONAL HIGHWAY,GANDHIDHAMGUJARAT-370201, INDIA GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG,

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has 'INVOICE TO:' field with 'SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED'. This is the primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED (certificate) vs SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED (invoice)
comparison_steps.result: The names differ: 'SARASWATI' vs 'SARASATI'. The certificate has 'W' in 'SARASWATI' while the invoice has 'SARASATI' (missing 'W'). This is a single character difference (the 'W' is missing in the invoice version).

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.8 - Single character deviation with confirming identifier
comparison_steps.description: Check if the single character difference can be resolved via confirming identifier
comparison_steps.result: Certificate GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG. Invoice GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG. GST numbers are IDENTICAL. The single character difference ('W' in SARASWATI vs absent in SARASATI) with matching GST number meets the conditions of 4.1.3.8. However, this rule requires the difference to be exactly ONE character (omitted, added, or substituted). 'SARASWATI' has 9 characters, 'SARASATI' has 8 characters — one character ('W') is omitted. This meets the single-character criterion. Land (India) matches. No other legal party with similar name exists in invoice. All conditions of 4.1.3.8 are met → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee country
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: India. Invoice: INDIA (in address block). MATCH after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Assess overall confidence for this checkpoint
comparison_steps.result: The name difference is a single character with matching GST identifier. Rule 4.1.3.8 explicitly allows MATCH in this case. However, the name difference SARASWATI vs SARASATI could also be two different legal entities (not just a typo). The GST number match is a strong confirming identifier. Confidence: 0.88.

rules_applied.description: Single character deviation with confirming identifier - applied to consignee per rule statement

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: SARASWATI and SARASATI are two different companies
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The GST numbers are identical (24AAPCS6579L1ZG), the addresses are identical, and the country is identical. The single character difference (omitted 'W') with all other identifiers matching strongly indicates the same legal entity with a spelling variation/typo.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, India, GST 24AAPCS6579L1ZG. Invoice INVOICE TO: SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, India, GST 24AAPCS6579L1ZG. Name differs by one character ('W' omitted). GST numbers match exactly. Address matches. Country matches. Rule 4.1.3.8 allows MATCH when single character deviation exists with matching confirming identifier. However, confidence is 0.72 due to the name discrepancy requiring interpretation. Since confidence < 0.85 for a MATCH, per section 7 confidence floor rule, this triggers MANUAL_REVIEW at overall level. Setting checkpoint to MANUAL_REVIEW to reflect the sub-0.85 confidence.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED skiljer sig från fakturans SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED med ett tecken ('W' saknas). GST-nummer är identiska (24AAPCS6579L1ZG), adress och land överensstämmer. Regel 4.1.3.8 tillåter enstaka teckenavvikelse med bekräftande identifierare, men osäkerheten om huruvida detta är samma juridiska part motiverar manuell granskning.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Pine ab grade (invoice p1), PINE AB GRADE;PINE (packing list p2)

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.2 - Priority order: No article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers
comparison_steps.result: No explicit article numbers found in certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2: controlled text matching.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the core product designation in certificate
comparison_steps.result: Certificate goods: 'Pinus sylvestris' (species name) and 'Pine AB Grade/pine'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Pine AB Grade' — this identifies the product (pine wood, AB grade quality).

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Pine AB Grade' in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1: 'Pine ab grade' — after case normalization: 'pine ab grade' = 'pine ab grade'. EXACT MATCH. Invoice page 2 (packing list): 'PINE AB GRADE;PINE' — also matches. The identity-bearing main designation is clearly identifiable in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Pinus sylvestris' (species name) causes issues
comparison_steps.result: 'Pinus sylvestris' is the Latin botanical name for Scots pine. It appears in the certificate but not explicitly in the invoice. However, the identity-bearing main designation 'Pine AB Grade' is verified. 'Pinus sylvestris' is supplementary species information that does not change the product identity. Per 4.3.4, additional elements that do not alter product identity do not cause MISMATCH when the main designation matches.

rules_applied.description: Priority order - no article numbers, use text matching
Non-identity-bearing additions do not cause MISMATCH

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because 'Pinus sylvestris' not found in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason: 'Pinus sylvestris' is the botanical species name supplementing the commercial product name 'Pine AB Grade'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Pine AB Grade' matches exactly. Per 4.3.4, supplementary species information does not alter product identity.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'Pinus sylvestris, Pine AB Grade/pine'. Invoice: 'Pine ab grade'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Pine AB Grade'. After case normalization, this exactly matches 'Pine ab grade' in the invoice. The packing list also confirms 'PINE AB GRADE;PINE'. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Pine AB Grade' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans produktrad 'Pine ab grade' efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Packningslistan bekräftar ytterligare 'PINE AB GRADE;PINE'.

checkpoints.invoice_value: 38.459 m3 (invoice p1), Total volume: 38.459 m3 (packing list p2)

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity from Box 7 is the verification basis
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains two quantities: 38.459 CBM and 24000.000 KGSgross. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one must be verified.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 38.459 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1: 'Qty m³: 38.459 m3'. The numeric value 38.459 matches exactly. CBM (cubic meters) corresponds to m3. MATCH for this quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 24000 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: The invoice does not contain any weight information (no KG, KGS, gross weight, or net weight fields). The packing list also does not contain weight information. The value 24000 cannot be identified in the invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3.1 - Multiple quantities: at least one verified
comparison_steps.description: Assess whether the first quantity verification is sufficient
comparison_steps.result: Per 4.4.3.1: 'Systemet ska verifiera MINST EN av dessa mot fakturan.' The volume (38.459 CBM) has been verified as MATCH. The weight (24000.000 KGS gross) cannot be found in the invoice — but the invoice does not contain ANY weight information, so there is no EXPLICIT contradiction. Per 4.4.3.1: other quantities should NOT cause MISMATCH if they cannot be verified AND no invoice data explicitly contradicts them. Since the invoice contains no weight data at all, no contradiction exists. MATCH per 4.4.3.1.

rules_applied.description: Multiple quantities - at least one must be verified

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because 24000 KGS gross weight not found in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified. The volume 38.459 CBM is verified. The weight is not found in the invoice, but the invoice contains NO weight information at all — so there is no explicit contradiction. Per the critical rule in 4.4.3.1 and the critical distinction 4.4.6.1 vs 4.4.3.1: since at least one quantity (volume) is already verified as MATCH, the absence of weight data does not downgrade to MANUAL_REVIEW.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: 38.459 CBM and 24000.000 KGSgross. Invoice: 38.459 m3 (exact numeric match for volume). No weight information exists in invoice or packing list. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity verified (volume) and no explicit contradiction for weight (weight simply absent). Per critical distinction 4.4.6.1 vs 4.4.3.1: since volume is verified as MATCH, the checkpoint is MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets volymangivelse 38.459 CBM kan identifieras exakt i fakturan som 38.459 m3. Vikten 24000.000 KGS gross kan inte identifieras i fakturan, men fakturan innehåller inga viktuppgifter alls — ingen uttrycklig motsägelse föreligger. Minst en kvantitetsuppgift är verifierad.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1: 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. This is a dedicated explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare SWEDEN (certificate) vs Sweden (invoice)
comparison_steps.result: After case normalization: 'sweden' = 'sweden'. EXACT MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Identification of origin in invoice - explicit origin field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Country of Origin (Box 3): SWEDEN. Invoice explicit field: 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. After case normalization: exact match. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland SWEDEN kan identifieras exakt i fakturans uttryckliga fält 'Country of Origin: Sweden' efter normalisering av versaler.

evidence.raw_text: Port of loading: Any port in Sweden

evidence.location: Certificate Box 2 and Invoice INVOICE TO block

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. LC exception not activated.
PASSED. Consignor identifiable via branding, consignee identifiable (with spelling variation). At least one criterion met.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Corporate structure - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: 'Wood Pie' found in invoice header. After space normalization, matches 'WOODPIE'. Sufficient for identification.
WOODPIE (cert) vs Wood Pie (invoice) — difference is only spacing. After normalization of extra spaces, names are identical.
AB (Aktiebolag) is a Swedish legal form suffix — removed during normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignor as invoice issuer without explicit seller address
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Conditions met but not needed — name match resolved via space normalization (4.1.3.1) and legal form (4.1.3.6). MATCH achieved without needing 4.1.3.9.
Sweden corroborated via 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden' and 'Country of Origin: Sweden'.
Primary billing field 'INVOICE TO' identified with SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Single character deviation with confirming identifier (applied to consignee)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: SARASWATI vs SARASATI — one character ('W') omitted. GST numbers identical. All conditions met. However, confidence < 0.85 due to name uncertainty → MANUAL_REVIEW per confidence floor rule.
'Pine AB Grade' matches 'Pine ab grade' after case normalization. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Multiple quantities - at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Volume 38.459 CBM verified against 38.459 m3. Weight not found but no contradiction. MATCH.
'Country of Origin: Sweden' found in explicit field. MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatets mottagare anges som 'SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED' medan fakturan anger 'SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED' — ett bokstavsfel ('W' saknas i fakturan). GST-nummer och adress är identiska, vilket talar starkt för att det är samma företag, men namnsskillnaden kräver manuell bekräftelse. Övriga kontrollpunkter (avsändare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) överensstämmer.
overall_assessment.summary: Four of five checkpoints verified as MATCH (consignor, goods description, quantity, country of origin). The consignee checkpoint shows a single-character name discrepancy (SARASWATI vs SARASATI) with matching GST number. While rule 4.1.3.8 supports MATCH for single character deviations with confirming identifiers, the confidence for this checkpoint is below 0.85, triggering the confidence floor rule (section 7) which requires MANUAL_REVIEW at overall level.
blocking_issues: Consignee name discrepancy: SARASWATI vs SARASATI (single character 'W' omitted). GST numbers match but name uncertainty warrants manual review.
non_blocking_notes: Consignor identified via branding 'Wood Pie' matching 'WOODPIE AB' after space normalization.
Weight (24000 KGS gross) not verifiable against invoice (no weight data in invoice), but volume verified and no contradiction exists.
Certificate remark 'P149' does not correspond to invoice number '1095' — no invoice number reference in certificate.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: Wood Pie (sidhuvud/varumärke), Port of loading: Any port in Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Normalisering av mellanslag (WOODPIE = Wood Pie), borttagning av bolagsformssuffix AB (4.1.3.6), landverifiering via 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden' (4.1.2.1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'WOODPIE AB' identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud som 'Wood Pie' efter normalisering av mellanslag och borttagning av bolagsform AB. Landet Sverige styrks av 'Port of loading: Any port in Sweden'.

sections.certificate_value: SARASWATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, India, GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG
sections.invoice_value: SARASATI WOOD PRIVATE LIMITED, India, GST NO: 24AAPCS6579L1ZG
sections.rule_applied: Enstaka teckenavvikelse med bekräftande identifierare (4.1.3.8). SARASWATI vs SARASATI skiljer sig med ett tecken ('W' saknas). GST-nummer matchar exakt. Confidence < 0.85 → MANUAL_REVIEW per confidence-golv (avsnitt 7).
sections.motivation: Mottagarnamnet skiljer sig med ett tecken: 'SARASWATI' (certifikat) vs 'SARASATI' (faktura). GST-nummer, adress och land är identiska, vilket starkt indikerar samma juridiska part. Dock kräver namnsskillnaden manuell bekräftelse.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3). Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Pine AB Grade' identifieras exakt i fakturan efter normalisering av versaler.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets produktbeteckning 'Pine AB Grade' matchar fakturans 'Pine ab grade' exakt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) för volym. Flera kvantitetsuppgifter — minst en verifierad (4.4.3.1). Vikten saknas i fakturan men ingen motsägelse föreligger.
sections.motivation: Volymen 38.459 CBM kan identifieras exakt i fakturan som 38.459 m3. Vikten 24000 KGS gross saknas i fakturan men ingen viktupp gift i fakturan motsäger certifikatets uppgift.

sections.rule_applied: Normalisering av versaler (4.5.4). Explicit ursprungsfält i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland SWEDEN identifieras exakt i fakturans dedikerade fält 'Country of Origin: Sweden'.

output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_check: Consignee checkpoint has confidence 0.72 < 0.85 for a potential MATCH → overall result elevated to MANUAL_REVIEW per section 7.
output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints verified. One checkpoint (consignee) set to MANUAL_REVIEW due to single-character name discrepancy with sub-0.85 confidence. Overall result: MANUAL_REVIEW.
